channel.title: Backdoor on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Backdoor on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: GigaWiper: Anatomy of a destructive backdoor assembled from multiple malware
item.description:
Microsoft describes GigaWiper as a destructive backdoor that merges wiping and ransomware-like capabilities into one platform. The analysis focuses on how it reuses code from multiple malware families and offers guidance for detection and defense.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: security: Crypto Clipper uses Tor and worm-like propagation for persistence and control
item.description:
Microsoft Threat Intelligence described a cryptocurrency clipper campaign that steals and replaces wallet addresses, uses Tor for command-and-control, and spreads in a worm-like way. The malware also maintains persistence and includes a lightweight backdoor for follow-on activity.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
